note: Chevron Corp careers run on Radancy/TalentBrew at careers.chevron.com; /search-jobs/results returns the standard Radancy JSON envelope. Company label 'Chevron' set so per-job company is entity-clean. Live got 30+ real Chevron US roles (International Income Tax Advisor, Senior Software Engineer, Aviation Advisor). bestbuy.eightfold.ai-style chevron.eightfold.ai tenant exists but is decommissioned (404/locked); Radancy is the live board.

ConocoPhillips on Workday (conocophillips.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/External), discovered from careers.conocophillips.com/job-search-results. Live total ~19 open reqs (lean energy hiring; full unbounded pull also 19) - all real ConocoPhillips US roles (Stabilizer Multi-Skill Operator, HSE Coordinator, Data and AI Architect).

The Coca-Cola Company on Workday (coke.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/coca-cola-careers). Live got 60+ (capped by limit) real Coca-Cola Company corporate/commercial roles (Senior Director Sales, Franchise Operations, Technical Operations). This is the parent company board, not a bottler/namesake.

Procter & Gamble (P&G) on Phenom (www.pgcareers.com, /widgets POST API). Live got 60+ (capped) real P&G US roles, Cincinnati OH HQ and US plants (Fabric & Home Care Integrated Media, Director of Marketing, Entry Level Manufacturing Plant Tech).

Kroger on Oracle Recruiting Cloud (eluq.fa.us2.oraclecloud.com, site CX_2001); jobs.kroger.com redirects to krogerfamilycareers.com/en/sites/CX_2001. Live got 60+ (capped) real Kroger US retail roles (Fred Meyer Jewelers jewelry/sales specialist, etc.).

United Parcel Service (UPS) on Phenom (www.jobs-ups.com, /widgets POST API, phenompeople CDNs). Live got 60+ (capped) real UPS US roles, Atlanta GA HQ (Regional Account Executive, FinTech Supervisor, Associate General Counsel, Industrial Maintenance Mechanic).
